note: Media Bulk Upload exposes a media_bulk_config config entity, a bulk upload form, static + dynamic permissions, and an alter hook. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On Drupal 11, which configuration entity does Media Bulk Upload define to set up a bulk upload form, and where in the admin UI do I create one?
evals.expected_output: The media_bulk_config config entity; managed at Admin > Configuration > Media > Bulk upload media (/admin/config/media/media-bulk-config), configure route entity.media_bulk_config.collection.

evals.prompt: What are the main settings I configure on a Media Bulk Upload configuration, and what is the default upload location?
evals.expected_output: media_types (which media types the form creates), form_mode (media form mode embedded for shared fields), and upload_location (default temporary://media-bulk-upload).

evals.prompt: In Media Bulk Upload, how is an uploaded file assigned to a media type? What happens when two selected media types allow the same extension?
evals.expected_output: Files are matched to a media type by their file extension (MediaTypeManager groups types by their source field's file_extensions). If several selected types share an extension, the file is assigned to one of them automatically.

evals.prompt: Which permission lets a role administer Media Bulk Upload configurations, and how is access to an individual bulk upload form controlled?
evals.expected_output: 'administer media_bulk_upload configuration' gates the config admin UI; each configuration also has a dynamic 'use {id} bulk upload form' permission gating its form at /media/bulk-upload/{id}.

evals.prompt: What are the front-end routes/paths a user visits to bulk upload media, and what happens if only one configuration exists?
evals.expected_output: /media/bulk-upload lists usable configs (media_bulk_upload.list); /media/bulk-upload/{media_bulk_config} is the form (media_bulk_upload.upload_form). With one usable config the list redirects straight to that form.

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal module I want to modify the list of uploaded file IDs before Media Bulk Upload creates media entities. Which hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_media_bulk_upload_file_ids_alter(array &$file_ids, string $media_bulk_config_id), invoked in the form's submitForm before the media-creation batch.

evals.prompt: What does Media Bulk Upload require to run, and which submodule provides a drag-and-drop uploader?
evals.expected_output: It depends on core Media (drupal:media). The media_bulk_upload_dropzonejs submodule provides DropzoneJS drag-and-drop uploads (and requires the dropzonejs module).
